description: Negative/error-path: reconnect with disposed session URI returns result.missing array containing that URI. Client surfaces JSON-RPC error code -32601.
notes: Auto-generated from D7 negative paths: reconnect.replay.edge.missing-subscriptions. Disposed sessions or channels the server can no longer serve appear in result.missing; clients must drop them from local subscription state.

steps.label: send reconnect to trigger the error condition
